data.content: Verified beat detail header shows the natural beat id first with alias chips as clickable copy targets in the form 'proj-1234 | proj-5678.3 (alias)'. On branch work/foolery-02d0 at a3dee9a5726b, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all pass in a dedicated worktree.
